summary: This article describes how a production delta-index pipeline migrated from scheduled batch to micro-batch Spark Structured Streaming. It covers why record-level streaming was rejected, how partition-based watermarks replaced fragile S3 completion markers,  overlap-window correctness, and restart-as-design strategies for better predictability in object-store–based ingestion systems. By Parveen Saini
